martial_arts_jeet_kune_do.description: Bruce Lee’s philosophy-based martial art focused on efficiency, directness, and adaptability.

cards.title: Basic Circle Walk
cards.description: A foundational technique for moving fluidly around an opponent while maintaining a defensive posture.
bulletpoints: Keep your posture upright and relaxed
Step with the heel first and roll onto the toes
Maintain consistent spacing between steps
cards.summaryText: Glide around your opponent with relaxed posture and even heel-to-toe steps.
